creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text: We install man pages with a tcl86 suffix to avoid conflicts with the other versions of Tcl available in ports, namely tcl85 and tcl87.  See how the manpage you link to is "zlib.tcl86" instead of being plain "zlib". We should probably patch the man pages so references in the "SEE ALSO" section take the suffix into account. I am not sure how automatizable that would be. I might take a look at some point.
